author: claude
content:
BATCH C + PHASE-3b SUMMARY (2026-06-19). Batch C (3 deeper branches) rebased onto master@origin 315e6672 / v0.35.0, all pushed, all MERGEABLE: #1151 dynamic-test-durations=795baa25 (clean); #1155 feat/dynamic-ci-test-durations-v2=29de670c (RESOLVED 1 .gitignore conflict, both-sides-keep); #1104 delete_tmpdir=9b704960 (clean; vringar's local branch, fork #1093 untouched). jj-precommit GREEN + pytest --collect-only clean (142 tests) on all 3.

AMBIGUITY VERDICTS:
(a) needs-human: #1151 is SUPERSEDED by #1155. Both are 'feat(ci): dynamic test duration tracking for pytest-split' by vringar, same 3 touched files (run-tests.yaml, scripts/ci.sh, test/conftest.py); #1155 ('v2') is the strict superset — additionally adds the .gitignore entries for the generated .test_durations* files and CI-env-var gating of the duration tracking. Recommendation: CLOSE #1151, keep #1155. (Both left open + rebased per instructions; this is the human call.)
(b) RESOLVED, NO OVERLAP: delete_tmpdir #1104 does NOT overlap merged tmpdir work on master. Master's only tmpdir code is profile-archiving (tempfile.mkdtemp 'openwpm_profile_archive_' + shutil.rmtree of profile paths). #1104 adds an orthogonal concern: a per-spawn browser_params.tmpdir handed to geckodriver via TMPDIR env so geckodriver's leftover XPI copy can be cleaned on browser close. No field/import collision; rebased clean. Not superseded.

PHASE-3b DE-NOISE: abandoned 30 orphan scratch heads (descriptions: scratch*/wip/WIP/verify c*/tmp*/anchor/orchestration-working-copy/build-verification-scratch/stealth-verify-workspace/hater-review-artifact). All verified NOT reachable from any bookmark, remote bookmark, or workspace @, and no merge commits. CONSERVATIVELY LEFT UNTOUCHED: every orphan with a real conventional-commit description (fix/feat/test/prototype/docs/chore/refactor) and every empty-description orphan — these may be unpushed work, older PR-branch bases, or divergent commits (incl #1183's known divergent 26d97393 and the pre-rebase #1155 head e3514f0b). If any of THOSE should also be swept, that's a human call.

ENV-BLOCKED (not regressions, lean on CI): browser tests (local FF150 vs manifest 152) — unchanged from prior batches. Conda env confirmed intact (Python 3.14.6, mypy 2.1.0, selenium 4.45.0; never modified). All obC-* workspaces forgotten+removed. Touched nothing outside this 3-branch batch + the Phase-3b scratch sweep.
